query:
SELECT 
  t.id,
  t.description,
  t.amount,
  t.nature,
  t.date,
  DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(t.date/1000), '%d/%m/%Y') as data_formatada
FROM transactions t
WHERE t.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'adri_assis@hotmail.com')
ORDER BY t.date ASC
LIMIT 1;
